title: DRILL 3.11 Zero-Input Response of First-Order Systems
summary: This page concludes a prior zero-input response derivation, then presents Drill 3.11 and Drill 3.12 on zero-input responses of first- and second-order discrete-time systems. It gives the governing difference equations, initial conditions, and closed-form answers, and transitions into a discussion of solving zero-input responses through recursion.
